problem.summary: Fuse FP8 cast, scale application, saturation, and amax collection so agents can reason about Transformer Engine on ROCm and hipBLASLt FP8 contracts.
constraints: Template-only; exact FP8 format, saturation policy, amax reduction order, and delayed scaling policy must be recorded
Do not claim numerical equivalence without format-aware oracle
Compare against Transformer Engine on ROCm where available

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or library oracle; compare all outputs across edge cases before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as a template-only task. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
